overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player walks along a red sidewalk beneath elevated highways, passes pedestrians and vehicles, ascends to an elevated viewing platform overlooking the futuristic cityscape, then returns to street level. The scene features cyberpunk architecture, neon advertisements, and a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: white sedan and other vehicles pass by on the left side of the walkway
slight navigation around pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing neon billboards and street activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green metal elevated highway structure with support columns and neon signage
concrete elevated highway casting shadows over the walkway
large digital screens displaying colorful neon advertisements
distinctive red paved sidewalk with scattered debris
green metal railing separating walkway from street traffic

segments.scene_description: Walking along a red sidewalk beneath elevated highways in a futuristic city. The space is narrow and sheltered, with neon billboards lining the left side and concrete highway structures overhead. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions while vehicles pass on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending ramp to elevated viewing platform

events.description: turning right and ascending from street level to elevated walkway via concrete ramp
reaching the top of the ramp and turning to face the open city view

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking up a ramp to an elevated viewing platform, transitioning from enclosed street to open overlook

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible in the distance
large yellow advertisement billboard with text on the right wall
distant mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: Ascending a concrete ramp to an elevated viewing platform. The scene transitions from the enclosed walkway to an open area with panoramic views of the futuristic city skyline and distant mountains. The camera turns right and climbs, revealing the urban landscape.

events.description: view opens up to reveal full cityscape with mountains and futuristic towers in background

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated platform, observing the panoramic city view with black glass skyscrapers and distant mountains

entered.detail: tall black skyscraper with teal neon window lights dominating the skyline
curved concrete barrier wall along the edge of the platform

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated viewing platform with wide open views of the city. The black glass skyscrapers rise prominently against the clear sky, with mountains visible in the distance. The area is empty of pedestrians, providing an unobstructed view of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street under elevated highway

events.description: descending ramp back to street level, returning to the covered walkway
red sports car and teal sedan drive past on the street below

agents.ego_description: descending the ramp back to street level and continuing along the sidewalk, observing traffic and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street alongside other traffic

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying REAL WANTS advertisement with purple and yellow colors
multiple vehicles including a distinctive red sports car and various sedans

segments.scene_description: Descending back to street level and continuing along the red sidewalk beneath the elevated highways. The scene returns to the urban street environment with moderate traffic including a prominent red sports car. Neon billboards line the buildings as the camera moves forward through the covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered urban corridor to an expansive city overlook before returning to the street level. It begins by moving along a narrow red sidewalk beneath concrete highway structures, passing neon billboards and sparse pedestrians in a confined space. As the camera turns right and ascends a concrete ramp, the enclosed walkway opens up into a panoramic viewing platform that reveals a vast skyline of black glass skyscrapers and distant mountains under a clear sky. The scene then shifts from this quiet, elevated vantage point as the camera descends back toward the city floor. Finally, the environment returns to the covered walkway, moving past neon-lit buildings and moderate traffic, including a prominent red sports car.
